items.title: New finding: ChatGPT sources 83% of its carousel products from Google Shopping via shopping query fan-outs
items.summary: Shopping fan-outs, on the other hand, typically target a specific shopping results page and therefore do not need to be as long. It appears the main goal is to retrieve products based on the shopping fan-out. Rather than compare chunks of text, the data in this study supports the hypothesis that ChatGPT relies heavily on Google organic shopping results to populate its carousel.

items.title: 阿里批准林俊旸离职，Qwen多位负责人离开，团队或将调整|阿里_新浪财经_新浪网
items.summary: 林俊旸系阿里千问模型的重要负责人，曾是阿里巴巴最年轻的P10级技术负责人。公开资料显示，林俊旸1993年出生，毕业于北京大学，通过校招加入了阿里AI研究机构达摩院的智能计算实验室(现通义实验室前身)，系阿里巴巴达摩院高级算法专家、阿里通义千问系列大模型技术负责人，主导开发了全球领先的开源大模型。他的研究领域包括自然语言处理和多模态表示学习，研究兴趣集中于大规模语言模型和多模态大模型，曾在多个顶级会议发表多篇论文。公开信息显示，林俊旸对通义千问的技术贡献突出，如他主导开发Qwen3.0等模型性能超越Llama2-70B、首创多模态Agent框架，增强视觉/语音理解能力、推动构建中文社区最大开源模型生态体系等。

items.title: Claude (language model) - Wikipedia
items.summary: Claude models are generative pre-trained transformers that have been trained to predict the next word in large amounts of text. Then, they have been fine-tuned using reinforcement learning from human feedback (RLHF) and constitutional AI in an attempt to enforce ethical guidelines.

items.title: Unlocking document understanding with Mistral Document AI in Microsoft Foundry - Cloud Computing Köln
items.summary: Mistral Document AI is an enterprise-grade document understanding model, offered via Microsoft Foundry. It’s built to convert both physical (scans, photos) and digital (PDFs, DOCX) documents into highly structured, machine-readable outputs.

items.title: Mistral AI - Wikipedia
items.summary: Mistral AI SAS (French: [mistʁal]) is a French artificial intelligence (AI) company, headquartered in Paris. Founded in 2023, it has open-weight large language models (LLMs), with both open-source and proprietary AI models. As of 2025 the company has a valuation of more than US$14 billion.

items.summary: 隨著人工智慧（AI）技術的普及，AI 代理人（AI Agent）在協助開發者處理日常任務時展現了強大的能力。然而，這項技術也帶來了前所未有的安全隱患。近日，知名 AI 資訊安全團隊的開發者們在測試爆火的 AI 機器人 OpenClaw 時，竟意外遭遇了一場「自我駭客（Self-hacked）」事件。由於 AI 模型在生成指令時的一個微小語法錯誤，導致測試環境中的所有機密金鑰被公開發布在 GitHub 上，最終使伺服器遭到不明攻擊者全面控制。

items.title: RAG Strategy & Execution: Build Enterprise Knowledge Systems
items.summary: In today’s fast-moving, data-rich enterprises, static knowledge systems are no longer enough. Enter Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) — a powerful AI technique that enables organizations to unlock the full value of their internal documents, policies, and processes.

items.title: 【505名調査】生成AIのハルシネーションを35.2%の企業が課題と認識、対策の最重要手法はRAG導入と判明 | Ragate株式会社のプレスリリース
items.summary: ハルシネーション低減に向た対策のうち、最も根本的かつ効果的な手法はRAG（Retrieval-Augmented Generation：検索拡張生成）の導入です。社内ナレッジベースや信頼できる情報源と連携させることで、LLMの回答を事実に基づいたものへと制約できます。

items.title: LLM vs RAG in 2026 Key Differences and Which to Choose
items.summary: Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) is an approach where the system first finds relevant information from external sources (knowledge bases, documents, databases) and then passes it to the LLM as context to generate a response.

items.summary: Perplexity AI, Inc., or simply Perplexity, is an American privately held software company offering a web search engine that processes user queries and synthesizes responses. Perplexity products use large language models and incorporate real-time web search capabilities, providing responses ...

items.title: As CoreWeave Signs a Deal with Perplexity, Should You Buy, Sell, or Hold CRWV Stock?
items.summary: On Wednesday, CoreWeave announced AI search company Perplexity has signed a deal to utilize CoreWeave's impressive data centers and cloud computing technology to enhance and build new services. Exactly what these services are and what they'll mean for consumers remains to be seen.
